Cropped short jet-black spiky hair pointing backward. Dark void aura, black energy. White pupil-less eyes.

Medium length jet-black jagged spiky hair, Goku-length. Dark void aura, black energy. White pupil-less eyes.

Long Hair
Variable
Long flowing jet-black hair down to shoulders, wild and jagged. Dark void aura, black energy. White pupil-less eyes.
Aura Style
Void Aura
Variable
Medium jet-black hair. Black void aura that absorbs all light around it, dark matter effect, light bending inward. White pupil-less eyes.
Aura Style
Dark Lightning
Variable
Medium jet-black hair. Dark purple and black lightning crackling violently around body, black energy core. White pupil-less eyes.
Aura Style
Smoke Aura
Variable
Medium jet-black hair. Dark black smoke wisps rising like black flames from body, ethereal and ominous. White pupil-less eyes.
Aura Style
Singularity
Variable
Medium jet-black hair. Gravitational singularity aura, space warping and bending around character, light being pulled inward like a black hole, reality distortion. White pupil-less eyes.
Eye Style
White Eyes
Variable
Medium jet-black hair. Void black aura. Pure white eyes with no pupils, blank and transcendent.
Eye cluster: full body + portrait crop to show detail at scale.
Eye Style
Black Eyes
Variable
Medium jet-black hair. Void black aura. Pure solid black eyes, total darkness, no iris or pupil visible.
Eye cluster: full body + portrait crop to show detail at scale.

Red on Black
Variable
Medium jet-black hair. Void black aura. Bright red iris on completely black sclera, menacing and demonic.
